action_notes: Confirm target formula returns A4 = 440 Hz.
Measure before deburr if safe; note cutter, kerf, HAZ, and warp.
Do not tune until burrs are controlled.

tolerance: no sharp burrs; no uncontrolled thinning
action_notes: Inspect both sides and root radius; photograph burr condition.
Record first stable tuner reading and spectrum if available.
Repeat for every tongue before material removal.

tolerance: final target plus/minus 10 cents before mount
action_notes: Log every trim pass and whether pitch rose or fell.
Compare mounted readings to temporary support readings.
Check damping and pitch shift after finish.
Public-review gate: update validation-report.md from measured data.
Inspect root radii under bright light.
Confirm player can strike all tongues without contacting sharp rim.
